LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 16, 2015 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302. THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING WAS TO CONTINUE THIS MATTER TO ALLOW PARTIES TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. AT THE HEARING, PETITIONER PROVIDED THE COURT WITH A COPY OF THE PETITION, AND RESPONDENT PROVIDED THE COURT WITH A COPY OF HIS MOTION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD WHICH THE COURT WILL CONSIDER AS THE RESPONDENT'S OPPOSITION TO THE PETITION. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE DAWN GHENO, CSR #7489; DEPT. 302. (302/AJR)

calendar.matters:
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Feb-11-2015 Text Ruling

Petitioner Zikl Inc. Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.
Off Calendar Jan-16-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. DANIEL E. LASSEN of Perkins Coie, Tel No. (650) 838-4357 appearing for the Petitioner Zikl, Inc. (CHRISTOPHER COLIN SUPKO present as representative from Zikl, Inc.);
Respondent DAMON PACE, Tel No. (415) 702-7172 appearing in pro per.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioner Zikl, Inc.'s Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. Respondent was served with the petition to confirm on November 7, 2014. Pursuant to CCP 1290.6, respondent had 10 days to file and serve a response. Respondent filed no such response and the allegations of the petition to confirm are deemed admitted. See CCP 1290. Respondent filed a petition to vacate the arbitration award on December 17, 2014. The petition to vacate is disregarded because it is untimely and moot in light of respondent's admissions. Pursuant to CCP 1288, respondent had 100 days from the service of the award to petition the court to vacate the award. The arbitrator served the award on August 8, 2014, and the respondent did not file and serve his petition to vacate within the mandatory deadline. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/AJR)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-15-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. DANIEL E. LASSEN of Perkins Coie, Tel No. (650) 838-4357 appearing for the Petitioner Zikl, Inc. (CHRISTOPHER COLIN SUPKO present as representative from Zikl, Inc.);
Respondent DAMON PACE, Tel No. (619) 300-2937 appearing in pro per.
PETITIONER ZIKL INC.'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

The Court's tentative ruling was to continue this matter to allow parties to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. At the hearing, Petitioner provided the Court with a copy of the petition, and Respondent provided the Court with a copy of his motion to vacate arbitration award which the Court will consider as the Respondent's opposition to the petition. Court continued this matter to January 16, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/AJR)
